name: Movie Guess Battle
description: Play real-time private-room movie battles from the Chrome popup or side panel.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://movie-guess-battle.netlify.app; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:
